'''âl-zh-w''' ('''kalazhaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allotransplant|allotransplant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allotransplant|allotransplant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-zh-w
|-
! Lemma
| kalazhaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilazhaw|thilazhaw]] || [[word:jilazhaw|jilazhaw]] || [[word:shilazhaw|shilazhaw]] || [[word:kilazhaw|kilazhaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulazhaw|thuthulazhaw]] || [[word:jujulazhaw|jujulazhaw]] || [[word:shushulazhaw|shushulazhaw]] || [[word:kukulazhaw|kukulazhaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulazhaw|thulazhaw]] || [[word:julazhaw|julazhaw]] || [[word:shulazhaw|shulazhaw]] || [[word:kulazhaw|kulazhaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulazhaw|thulazhaw]] || [[word:julazhaw|julazhaw]] || [[word:shulazhaw|shulazhaw]] || [[word:kulazhaw|kulazhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelazhaw|thelazhaw]] || [[word:jelazhaw|jelazhaw]] || [[word:shelazhaw|shelazhaw]] || [[word:kelazhaw|kelazhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholazhaw|thotholazhaw]] || [[word:jojolazhaw|jojolazhaw]] || [[word:shosholazhaw|shosholazhaw]] || [[word:kokolazhaw|kokolazhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholazhaw|tholazhaw]] || [[word:jolazhaw|jolazhaw]] || [[word:sholazhaw|sholazhaw]] || [[word:kolazhaw|kolazhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholazhaw|tholazhaw]] || [[word:jolazhaw|jolazhaw]] || [[word:sholazhaw|sholazhaw]] || [[word:kolazhaw|kolazhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlazhaw|thĂŠlazhaw]] || [[word:jĂŠlazhaw|jĂŠlazhaw]] || [[word:shĂŠlazhaw|shĂŠlazhaw]] || [[word:kĂŠlazhaw|kĂŠlazhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalazhaw|thathalazhaw]] || [[word:jajalazhaw|jajalazhaw]] || [[word:shashalazhaw|shashalazhaw]] || [[word:kakalazhaw|kakalazhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalazhaw|thalazhaw]] || [[word:jalazhaw|jalazhaw]] || [[word:shalazhaw|shalazhaw]] || [[word:kalazhaw|kalazhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalazhaw|thalazhaw]] || [[word:jalazhaw|jalazhaw]] || [[word:shalazhaw|shalazhaw]] || [[word:kalazhaw|kalazhaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalazhaw|shalazhaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalazhaw|goshalazhaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalazhaw|gokishalazhaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalazhawnĂŒ|shalazhawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalazhawnknĂŒ|goshalazhawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazhawnĂŒ|gokishalazhawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalazhawshĂ«|shalazhawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkshĂ«|goshalazhawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalazhawshĂ«|gokishalazhawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazhawro|shalazhawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkro|goshalazhawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazhawro|gokishalazhawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazhawmu|shalazhawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkmu|goshalazhawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazhawmu|gokishalazhawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalazhawsher|shalazhawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalazhawnksher|goshalazhawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalazhawsher|gokishalazhawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalazhawng|shalazhawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkng|goshalazhawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalazhawng|gokishalazhawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalazhawya|shalazhawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkya|goshalazhawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalazhawya|gokishalazhawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalazhawyam|shalazhawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkyam|goshalazhawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalazhawyam|gokishalazhawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazhawnĂŒshĂ«|shalazhawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazhawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalazhawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazhawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalazhawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazhawnĂŒro|shalazhawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazhawnknĂŒro|goshalazhawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazhawnĂŒro|gokishalazhawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazhawnĂŒmu|shalazhawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazhawnknĂŒmu|goshalazhawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazhawnĂŒmu|gokishalazhawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazhawshĂ«nĂŒ|shalazhawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalazhawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazhawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalazhawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazhawshĂ«ro|shalazhawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkshĂ«ro|goshalazhawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazhawshĂ«ro|gokishalazhawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazhawshĂ«mu|shalazhawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkshĂ«mu|goshalazhawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazhawshĂ«mu|gokishalazhawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazhawronĂŒ|shalazhawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkronĂŒ|goshalazhawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazhawronĂŒ|gokishalazhawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazhawroshĂ«|shalazhawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkroshĂ«|goshalazhawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazhawroshĂ«|gokishalazhawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalazhawromu|shalazhawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkromu|goshalazhawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalazhawromu|gokishalazhawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalazhawmunĂŒ|shalazhawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkmunĂŒ|goshalazhawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalazhawmunĂŒ|gokishalazhawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalazhawmushĂ«|shalazhawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkmushĂ«|goshalazhawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalazhawmushĂ«|gokishalazhawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalazhawmuro|shalazhawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalazhawnkmuro|goshalazhawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalazhawmuro|gokishalazhawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
